headline: Allegion’s Push Into Electronics and AI-Enabled Security Could Be A Game Changer For Allegion (ALLE)
summary: In March 2026, Allegion plc outlined its evolving strategy at industry conferences, highlighting a shift from traditional mechanical locks toward electronics, software-based security and AI-enabled efficiency. An under-the-radar element is Allegion’s plan to keep investing in R&D while electronics already make up over 30% of revenue, suggesting a deeper transformation of its business mix. Now we’ll explore how Allegion’s accelerated shift toward electronics and software-based security...
